title: Pro account architecture
selection_reason: Backend billing, entitlement, webhook, and infrastructure planning triggers architecture guardrails; delegated to a bounded docs-only worker while implementation stayed local.
validations: Architecture includes Cloudflare-first path, Render fallback, data model, routes, secrets, webhook lifecycle, Klaviyo events, security/privacy constraints, rollout beads, validation, rollback.
notes: Committed and pushed by sub-agent before Bead 23A implementation commit.

title: Brand landing, documentation elements, blog stub, and pro checkout scaffold
selection_reason: Single Worker app surface with frontend, docs, and bounded checkout/Klaviyo scaffolding; no schema or entitlement grant changes were implemented.
fallback_agent: Frontend Engineer plus Backend Engineer split
tests: curl local /api/health, /blog, static asset, and POST /api/checkout
validations: MagicPath Brutalism/Ramp themes inspected and translated into court-image palette and copy feel.
Bibe Code landing and checkout/Klaviyo flow inspected as reference only; no secrets copied.
Desktop and mobile local rendering checked with no horizontal overflow.
POST checkout fails gracefully when Stripe is not configured.
notes: Stripe entitlement, webhook persistence, and Pro account storage intentionally deferred to the architecture bead sequence.

title: Deploy refreshed landing page to Cloudflare Workers
selection_reason: Deployment/runtime behavior changed and required direct Wrangler deploy plus live smoke checks against Cloudflare Workers.
validations: Live URL https://baseline-ai.ryan-borker.workers.dev served refreshed landing page and blog stub.
Live health returned db:true, stripe:false, token_required:true, lifecycle_email:false.
Live uploaded image asset returned HTTP/2 200.
Rollback path is Cloudflare Workers version rollback to the prior deployed version from the Cloudflare dashboard or Wrangler deployment history.
notes: Stripe and Klaviyo remain unconfigured on production, so checkout displays the expected unconfigured Stripe error instead of creating sessions.
